import asyncio
import os

REPO_DIR: str = os.getenv("REPO_DIR") or ""
if not REPO_DIR:
    raise RuntimeError(
        "REPO_DIR environment variable is not set.\n"
        "Create a .env file from .env.example and set REPO_DIR "
        "to the absolute path of your local Overleaf git clone."
    )
REPO_DIR = os.path.abspath(os.path.expanduser(REPO_DIR))

        ...

        ...

):
        ...



TOOLS = {
    "read_paper": read_paper,
    "update_and_push_paper": update_and_push_paper,
    "read_bibliography": read_bibliography,
    "update_and_push_bibliography": update_and_push_bibliography,
}
